{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322084239AB1C22F6E6C1C88ED81B"}"},"total":68},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7459430521001771801","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的还行，创意比穿越国运好太多，解释更合理，但是文中设定太多，开局爽点不够，不过文笔还行，创意够好，还可以一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736787223,"group_id":"7450034211144092696","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个懒散咸鱼的苦逼高中生","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3mvvJLo82hWnjuDlWufrQs=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"111090940176","user_name":"其实狼少"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111090940176","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7450034211144092696","book_info":{"abstract":"从真实的历史人物、演义的小说人物、幻想的神话人物，到历史的大事件，再到某个时期的全球格局，甚至一幅画、一盘棋、一场举世瞩目的运动会，凡是文明的闪光点皆可成为构筑神奇力量的支点！
这就是国运擂台！
什么？因为文化缺失和历史断层，华夏龙国在国运擂台上毫无建树，甚至被嗤笑成最垃圾的文明？
徐云曦要让新纪元的世界睁大眼睛瞧瞧，从文到武，华夏点滴皆为峰！
英灵不够强大？
那就唤醒最强大的英灵！
没有强大的奇观？
重现天下第一关--山海关，它就是最强防御奇观！
再现“受命于天，既寿永昌”的传国玉玺，此物就是最强的手持奇观！
曹魏虎豹营、大唐陌刀军...宇宙中的天宫空间站、蓝海之上的航母编队、大地之上的钢铁洪流重装合成旅、五常席位...这些也可以被视作非建筑类的奇观！
一个文明，谁没有可歌可泣的英雄人物啊？
强大英灵不算什么！
在万事万物皆可用来构筑神奇力量的规则下，历史进程中点点滴滴的辉煌，才是赢得国运擂台真正的胜负手！
巧了，华夏绵延上下五千年，不光风流人物多，光辉时刻和奇闻异事更是无穷无尽！
国运擂台，看似是英灵间的比拼，但真正比的一个文明的底蕴！
比底蕴，华夏会输？
开什么玩笑！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o84a5db8cb65d1999401a5c182c0a4fd0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"仲夏焱","author_id":"","book_id":"7450034211144092696","book_name":"国运擂台：从文到武，华夏皆为峰","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301020","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7450034318312751640","read_count":"26","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"505210"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.3","serial_count":"204","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,国运,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o84a5db8cb65d1999401a5c182c0a4fd0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779324159&x-signature=nZ0pJBUGNhAcQ37rVQurTlu18W0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102251010220","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322084239AB1C22F6E6C1C88ED81B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读38分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2309,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1908},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7459619385988154137","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者是个成熟的老作者，写韩信擂台赛时一波三折，龙套演员表现也都很齐全，可见写作说法纯熟。
就是写的是新世界，设定比较多，所以前期讲设定比较多，就没那么好看。我也看了，这些设定还必须写，因为这些设定不是常见通用可以省略的。
费这么大劲写的设定，加上作者是个熟练工，这个作品值得期待，就是我看到的太早了，字数还太少，感觉世界观还没都构建后","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":25,"text":"演员","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%BC%94%E5%91%98&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774140159C88ED81B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227459619385988154137%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227450034211144092696%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%BC%94%E5%91%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736834569,"group_id":"7450034211144092696","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwPq71w+wq0/gWiakuzXpqU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705984&x-signature=QHDhoc9A4xYYe1ipmBRBiQQhjZY%3D","user_id":"544964370504015","user_name":"唐春草"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"544964370504015","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7450034211144092696","book_info":{"abstract":"从真实的历史人物、演义的小说人物、幻想的神话人物，到历史的大事件，再到某个时期的全球格局，甚至一幅画、一盘棋、一场举世瞩目的运动会，凡是文明的闪光点皆可成为构筑神奇力量的支点！
